name: My Top Doctor Stole My Heart
overview: Car racer Xia Junfeng seeks treatment for an embarrassing condition and meets urologist Jing Ye. From the moment he sees Xia Junfeng, Jing Ye is captivated, and under the guise of providing medical care, he gradually grows closer to him. Their doctor-patient relationship slowly crosses professional boundaries, and Jing Ye becomes an indispensable presence in Xia Junfeng’s life.
